otherNightReminder: If they died, show them a character of a living neighbor.
name: Crow
ability: You think you are an Outsider, but you are not. If you die, you learn the character of a living neighbor tonight. [ -0 or -1 Outsider]
flavor: Mind your omens. They may be boons in disguise.

otherNightReminder: They choose a player & a word. Something happens. Announce the chosen word.
name: Sybil
ability: Each night*, choose a player & a word: something related to the word happens to the player. All players know the chosen word.
flavor: Wdym nothing happens if I choose Orpheus and say bitch?

name: Truthsayer
ability: Once per game, during the day, you may publicly claim Truthsayer & choose to initiate a round robin. If good players are not mad as the character they are during the round robin, they might turn into an Outsider tonight, even if dead.
flavor: Speak your truth—or be judged unworthy.
otherNightReminder: Players who failed the Truthsayer's round robin might turn into an Outsider.

firstNightReminder: Show the Minions the 2 Townsfolk The Ancient One made evil.
name: The Ancient One
ability: Each night*, a player might die. Minions start knowing who the 2 evil townsfolk are. The 2 evil townsfolk hold The Ancient One (they don't learn) & "are the Demon". [2 Townsfolk are evil (they don't know)]
flavor: We worship you O Ancient one. We shall punish those who sealed you. We bring forth two sinners from the town for you to feast on their souls and return to the mortal plane.
